final:
module RefModule (
    input wire J,
    input wire K,
    input wire CLK,
    input wire RST,
    output reg Q
);
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge CLK or posedge RST or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (RST) begin
            Q <= 0;
        end else begin
            case ({J, K})
                2'b00: Q <= Q;         // Hold previous state
                2'b01: Q <= 0;         // Reset
                2'b10: Q <= 1;         // Set
                2'b11: Q <= ~Q;        // Toggle
            endcase
        end
    end
endmodule
